strategy: Hit Fire. He takes +25% Fire (and +15% Myth) while resisting 60% Ice and 30% Storm, so Fire single-target hits are ideal.
Do not cast Attack-All-Enemies spells. An AoE makes him counter with an Ice Trap and then an enhanced Blizzard (290-330). Keep every hit single-target.
Watch your wand: a 125 Fire wand hit can sometimes set off the same Blizzard counter, so wand carefully.
Do not rely on traps. Any trap on Jokul is interrupted and removed, so Feint will not stick. Set up with blades instead.
He is stunable and beguilable, so a stun can buy a setup round. Stack Fire blades and finish with one single-target Fire hit through his low health.
cheatNotes: Casting an Attack-All-Enemies spell makes him counter with an Ice Trap followed by an enhanced Blizzard (290-330, 80%). Use single-target hits.
A wand hit dealing 125 Fire damage can sometimes trigger that same Blizzard counter.
Any trap placed on Jokul is interrupted and removed, so Feints and traps will not hold.
